input.prompt: Goal: harden the public /users endpoint. Acceptance criteria: every response body validates against the published OpenAPI schema.

metadata.criterion: Response-shape validation gets a blocking schema gate.

input.prompt: Goal: ship a date-parsing helper for our SDK. Acceptance criteria: the parser handles ISO 8601 timestamps with timezone offsets, proven by unit tests.

metadata.criterion: A unit-testable behavior gets a blocking unit_test gate.

input.prompt: Goal: automate customer refunds end to end. Acceptance criteria: refunds above 1000 dollars are only processed after a human approves them.

metadata.criterion: An explicit human sign-off criterion gets an approval gate with humanApprovalRequired.

input.prompt: Goal: revamp the checkout flow. Acceptance criteria: the end-to-end checkout test suite passes against the staging environment.

metadata.criterion: An e2e-suite criterion gets an integration_test gate.

input.prompt: Goal: refactor the billing module without behavior changes. Acceptance criteria: the full diff passes an independent code review before merge.

metadata.criterion: A code-review criterion gets a review gate.

input.prompt: Goal: cut p95 latency on the search API. Acceptance criteria: every external service call appears in the distributed trace for the request.

metadata.criterion: A telemetry criterion gets a trace gate.

input.prompt: Goal: build a CSV importer for bulk contact uploads. Acceptance criteria: 1) malformed rows are rejected with a per-row error report; 2) importing 50000 rows completes without errors in the integration environment; 3) the importer output validates against the contacts schema; 4) enabling the importer for a tenant requires support-team sign-off.

metadata.criterion: Mixed criteria each get their own correctly-typed gate.
A goal with no verifiable criteria fails loudly instead of finishing with zero gates.

input.prompt: Goal: add CSV export to the orders dashboard. Acceptance criteria: 1) exports of 10000 rows finish in under 5 seconds; 2) the CSV column set matches the visible table columns; 3) the export button is disabled while an export is running.

metadata.criterion: The gate matrix covers every extracted criterion, checked by a deterministic parity node.
